STRAIGHT LINE THUNDERSTORM WIND DAMAGE WAS EVIDENT NEAR A HOME JUST WEST OF WATKINS GLEN NEW YORK. A ROOF WAS PARTIALLY TORN OFF A SHED. A SMALL CHICKEN COUP WAS MOVED OFF ITS FOUNDATION BY ALMOST A FOOT. THERE WERE ALSO SEVERAL BRANCHES DOWN IN THE STORM DAMAGE AREA. THE DAMAGE WAS CONSISTENT WITH STRAIGHT LINE WINDS WITH ESTIMATED WIND SPEEDS OF AROUND 65 MPH.

MAJOR FLASH FLOODING AROUND THE ITHACA AREA. CARS ARE FLOODED ON CAYUGA AND LAKE STREET WITH WATER UP TO THE DOORS. 2 FEET OF WATER WAS FLOWING THROUGH A HOME ON HECTOR STREET. EASTSHORE DRIVE HAS A FLOODED UNDERPASS AND DEBRIS ON THE ROADWAY. THE INTERSECTION OF PINE TREE AND ELLIS HOLLOW ROAD IS FLOODED WITH AT LEAST 2 CARS STRANDED IN THE FLOOD WATERS.
